speaker: Court Clerk
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for the recurring Court Clerk NPC in Pig & Swine RPG. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.
source_role_summary: Controls access to District Court, Housing Court, arbitration venue, and Supreme Court corridors
Handles filing windows, bundle checks, stamping, hearing callouts, and retry guidance
Soft tutorial voice for procedural readiness
Dryly immune to Pig & Swine chaos

voice_profile.core_voice: overworked, precise, calm, politely stern, administratively fluent, dry but helpful
comedy_engine: treats absurd crises as ordinary filing problems with office hours
is kind when the player is lost but immovable when procedure is missing
has seen every form of panic and gives it a receipt number
quietly respects Asia because both keep institutions functioning
turns spectacle into queues, stamps, bundles, tabs, and hearing lists
do: make the clerk genuinely useful as a navigation and readiness NPC
use short, practical, searchable procedural lines
keep humour dry and bureaucratic, not cruel
show quiet solidarity with other overworked administrative characters
use the clerk to route the player to evidence, bundles, deadlines, and correct rooms
do_not: make the clerk obstructive for no reason
turn the clerk into a judge
give legal advice beyond procedural direction

relationship_dynamics.Dr. A. Cula: helps him learn court logistics while refusing to fix his legal argument
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Pig: keeps Pig's panic away from counters, stamps, and judges
relationship_dynamics.Asia: recognises a fellow overworked administrative expert and respects her file discipline
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Murrow: likes Murrow's structured filings and issue lists
relationship_dynamics.Crab: appreciates precise dates and receipt numbers
relationship_dynamics.Whimsy: gently edits his metaphors into acceptable hearing descriptions
relationship_dynamics.Bajtek: requires technical evidence to be printed, indexed, and not plugged into court equipment
relationship_dynamics.Judges: protects their time by enforcing readiness gates
relationship_dynamics.Advocate Szpon: recognises polished counsel but does not bend procedure for polish
relationship_dynamics.Attorney Grzyb: accepts beige compliance but still checks page numbers

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft for later rewriting into godot/data/dialogues/dialogues.json.
